Alko Oy Keskusvarasto.reason: Large national distributor with 168-day overdue balance (€18,484); enforce strict 45-day terms on new orders until current debt resolves.

Kesko Oyj Päivittäistavarakauppa.reason: Major retailer chain now 6 days overdue on €3,296; reduce DSO to 30 days and require prepayment on next PO.

My Dear Beer B.V..reason: Export customer 53 days overdue (€9,558); align with export DSO baseline of 30 days but verify currency/customs delays.

OlutSatama (Ideaosuuskunta Aito).reason: Cooperative distributor 278 days overdue (€5,882); likely restructuring needed; contact immediately to establish recovery plan.

CBA Craft Beer Agency.reason: Agency partner 6 days overdue (€3,142); reduce to 20 days and flag for commission holdback until compliant.

alerts.message: Hold all new shipments immediately. Invoice #4460 (€18,484) is 162 days overdue. Escalate to CFO for collection strategy and potential legal referral.
Total overdue AR of €70,111 (54 invoices) exceeds one month of fixed costs (€62,781). Activate parallel collections on top 5 overdue accounts representing €42,955 (61% of overdue balance).
Invoice #14 (€4,540) is 603 days overdue. Determine if account is dead (write-off) or requires recovery action; do not extend new credit.
Internal customer has €2,451 overdue across 2 invoices (oldest: 2020-05-07, 2,044 days). Reconcile immediately; if legitimate, convert to equity or formal loan.
April revenue target (€201,863) vs. recent 30-day actuals (€37,659) shows 82% variance. Verify if budget is front-loaded to August or if April is weak; adjust cash forecast accordingly.
National chain now 6 days overdue on €3,296. Require signed payment commitment by 2026-04-11 or suspend further deliveries.
44 open POs (€79,996) are in-flight inventory; ensure no payments for these trigger until goods are received and invoiced. Verify 30-day payables window is maintained.
Bemböle contract (€25K/mo revenue) ends September 2026. Prepare for €75K cash gap in Q4; secure replacement sales by July or reduce operating costs by then.

insights.weekly_cash_risk: €70K overdue AR combined with €62,781 fixed monthly costs creates 6-day liquidity buffer; if Alko (€18.5K) or Kesko (€3.3K) don't remit by 2026-04-14, immediate covenant/working capital financing risk.
insights.top_action: Call Alko Oy today (2026-04-09) to negotiate partial payment or payment plan on €18,484 overdue invoice #4460; freeze new shipments until commitment received; simultaneously engage a credit agency for Wet Goods PTE (€4,540, 603 days) and OlutSatama (€5,882, 278 days) recovery.
pattern_insights: 54 overdue invoices averaging €1,298 per invoice suggests systemic DSO creep across small and medium customers, not isolated defaults; implement automated payment reminder workflow (day 10, day 25, day 35 post-due).

Export customer (My Dear Beer B.V., €9,558 at 53 days) and domestic chains (Alko, Kesko) both overdue; verify if currency hedging, customs clearance, or retailer cash-flow crisis is blocking payment; contact by customer segment this week.
insights.wc_note: At 62% YoY growth, AR is growing faster than payables management capacity; €70K overdue + €126K open AR (€196K total) against €79,996 in committed POs creates 50-day cash conversion cycle drag that will worsen without immediate DSO enforcement and collections discipline.
